context: Source: Video 2: Intro to Component Builder (11:27). Evolution: charmeleon. MCP tool: synapse_solaris_component_builder. Live validated: T2 PASS (H21.0.631). Constraints: Component Builder is a subnet containing componentgeometry, materiallibrary, componentmaterial, and componentoutput.; The 'default' output of Component Geometry maps to render purpose (full resolution).; The 'proxy' output maps to proxy purpose (low-poly for viewport).
